---
title: "Stack"
description: >-
  Technology stack: languages, R and Python ecosystems, sequencing and signal
  analysis, databases, infrastructure and authoring tools.
toc: false
---

::: {.lead .reveal}
The tools I work with day to day.
:::

::: {.stack-grid}

::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-braces"></i></span>

#### Languages
::: {.tag-row}
[R]{.tag} [Python]{.tag} [SQL]{.tag} [Bash]{.tag} [JavaScript]{.tag} [PHP]{.tag}
:::
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i></span>

#### R ecosystem
::: {.tag-row}
[tidyverse]{.tag} [ggplot2]{.tag} [Bioconductor]{.tag} [Shiny]{.tag}
[DBI]{.tag} [dbplyr]{.tag} [pool]{.tag} [roxygen2]{.tag} [testthat]{.tag}
[pkgdown]{.tag} [Rcpp]{.tag}
:::
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d3}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-cpu"></i></span>

#### Python and machine learning
::: {.tag-row}
[NumPy]{.tag} [pandas]{.tag} [scikit-learn]{.tag} [Keras]{.tag}
[TensorFlow]{.tag} [Computer vision]{.tag} [Deep learning on signal data]{.tag}
:::
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-activity"></i></span>

#### Nanopore and signal
::: {.tag-row}
[Direct RNA sequencing]{.tag} [cDNA sequencing]{.tag} [Dorado]{.tag}
[Guppy (legacy)]{.tag} [Signal-level analysis]{.tag} [poly(A) estimation]{.tag}
[POD5]{.tag} [fast5]{.tag}
:::
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i></span>

#### Bioinformatics
::: {.tag-row}
[minimap2]{.tag} [samtools]{.tag} [BAM tag handling]{.tag}
[Long-read alignment]{.tag} [Benchmarking]{.tag}
:::
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d3}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-database"></i></span>

#### Databases
::: {.tag-row}
[MySQL / MariaDB]{.tag} [SQLite]{.tag} [PostgreSQL]{.tag} [phpMyAdmin]{.tag}
[Schema design]{.tag} [Audit logging]{.tag} [HDF5]{.tag}
:::
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-terminal"></i></span>

#### Infrastructure
::: {.tag-row}
[Git]{.tag} [GitHub]{.tag} [GitHub Actions]{.tag} [Docker]{.tag} [Linux]{.tag}
[WSL]{.tag} [HPC and SLURM]{.tag} [Shiny Server]{.tag} [Apache]{.tag}
:::
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-vector-pen"></i></span>

#### Authoring and figures
::: {.tag-row}
[Quarto]{.tag} [R Markdown]{.tag} [knitr]{.tag} [renv]{.tag} [Typst]{.tag}
[Inkscape]{.tag} [Affinity]{.tag} [Procreate]{.tag} [SVG by hand]{.tag}
:::
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d3}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-check2-square"></i></span>

#### Practice
::: {.tag-row}
[Code review]{.tag} [Semantic versioning]{.tag} [Deprecation cycles]{.tag}
[Issue-driven work]{.tag} [Data management plans]{.tag}
[LLM-assisted development]{.tag}
:::
:::

:::

::: {.btn-row}
<a class="btn-cta" href="software.qmd"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i> See it applied</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="publications/index.qmd"><i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> Publications</a>
:::
